import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.optim as optim
from torch.utils.data import Dataset, DataLoader
from sklearn.metrics import f1\_score
from tqdm import tqdm
import transformers

# Define the MLP model
class MLP(nn.Module):
 def \_\_init\_\_(self, input\_dim, hidden\_dim, output\_dim):
 super(MLP, self).\_\_init\_\_()
 self.fc1 = nn.Linear(input\_dim, hidden\_dim)
 self.fc2 = nn.Linear(hidden\_dim, output\_dim)
 
 def forward(self, x):
 x = torch.relu(self.fc1(x))
 x = self.fc2(x)
 return x

# Define the custom dataset
class NewsDataset(Dataset):
 def \_\_init\_\_(self, csv\_file, tokenizer):
 self.data = pd.read\_csv(csv\_file)
 self.tokenizer = tokenizer
 
 def \_\_len\_\_(self):
 return len(self.data)
 
 def \_\_getitem\_\_(self, idx):
 text = self.data.iloc[idx]['text']
 label = self.data.iloc[idx]['label']
 text\_tensor = torch.tensor(self.tokenizer.encode(text)).long()
 label\_tensor = torch.tensor(label).long()
 return text\_tensor, label\_tensor
# Define the training function
def train(model, device, train\_loader, optimizer, criterion):
 model.train()
 running\_loss = 0.0
 for batch\_idx, (data, target) in enumerate(train\_loader):
 data, target = data.to(device), target.to(device)
 optimizer.zero\_grad()
 output = model(data)
 loss = criterion(output, target)
 loss.backward()
 optimizer.step()
 running\_loss += loss.item()
 train\_loss = running\_loss / len(train\_loader)
 return train\_loss
# Define the evaluation function
def evaluate(model, device, test\_loader):
 model.eval()
 y\_true, y\_pred = [], []
 with torch.no\_grad():
 for data, target in test\_loader:
 data, target = data.to(device), target.to(device)
 output = model(data)
 pred = output.argmax(dim=1)
 y\_true.extend(target.cpu().numpy())
 y\_pred.extend(pred.cpu().numpy())
 f1 = f1\_score(y\_true, y\_pred, average='macro')
 return f1
# Set the device
device = torch.device('cuda:0' if torch.cuda.is\_available() else 'cpu')

# Set the hyperparameters
input\_dim = 300 # word embedding size
hidden\_dim = 128
output\_dim = 8 # number of labels
lr = 0.001
num\_epochs = 10

# Load the data
tokenizer = transformers.RobertaTokenizer.from\_pretrained('roberta-base')
train\_dataset = NewsDataset('train.csv', tokenizer)
test\_dataset = NewsDataset('test.csv', tokenizer)
train\_loader = DataLoader(train\_dataset, batch\_size=32, shuffle=True)
test\_loader = DataLoader(test\_dataset, batch\_size=32, shuffle=False)

# Initialize the model, criterion, and optimizer
model = MLP(input\_dim, hidden\_dim, output\_dim).to(device)
criterion = nn.CrossEntropyLoss()
optimizer = optim.Adam(model.parameters(), lr=lr)

# Train the model
for epoch in range(num\_epochs):
 train\_loss = train(model, device, train\_loader, optimizer, criterion)
 f1 = evaluate(model, device, test\_loader)
 print('Epoch: {} | Train loss: {:.4f} | F1 score: {:.4f}'.format(epoch+1, train\_loss, f1))
